Washer STL Generator

Quickly generate printable washer STLs from a few dimensions. Outer and inner diameter, thickness, smoothness, and an optional 90° slice are all you need.

Generator

All dimensions are in millimeters. Circles are approximated with polygons; increase segments for a smoother edge (and larger file).

Status
Ready.

Printing tips

Designed for FDM printers. The washer is generated lying flat, so you can print it without supports.

  • Orientation: Flat side on the build plate.
  • Layer height: 0.2 mm or finer for thin washers.
  • Material: PLA, PETG, or similar.

More tools & projects

If you like this washer generator, you might also find these useful:

  • Washer STL generator (CLI & web)
  • Adapters collection with generator (distances, plant pot covers, adapters)

Created by Michal Mietlinski.
